title: arum orientale var. normannii
intro: Arum orientale var. normannii, also known as the Wild Cat's Tongue or Dragon's Tongue, is a variant of the Arum orientale plant, a type of flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Arum orientale var. normannii include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and treating skin irritations, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
